modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to remove Online Writing Center from D2L account

full_description_text:  
The user has indicated that they are no longer enrolled in a course at USD. Consequently, they would like to have the USD Online Writing Center removed from their D2L account. This request stems from their current status, which no longer requires access to the writing center services. The user is seeking assistance in ensuring that this online resource is no longer associated with their D2L profile.
